name: test_check_runners_no_runners
description:
arrange: A working application with no runners.
    act: Run check-runners action.
    assert: Action returns result with no runner.
descriptionHtml:
arrange: A working application with no runners.
act: Run check-runners action.
assert: Action returns result with no runner.
